final_state.project_description: Build a full enterprise SAP CAP and SAP Fiori solution for global procurement, vendor lifecycle, sourcing events, contract management, purchase requisitions, purchase orders, inventory reservations, warehouse fulfillment, field service dispatch, service work orders, service confirmations, invoicing, approvals, audit trails, dashboards, multilevel role-based security, analytics, notification hooks, and external integrations with S/4HANA Business Partner, S/4HANA Product Master, and SuccessFactors employee data.

roles.name: ServiceManager
roles.description: Manage field service dispatch and execution

final_state.architecture_context_md:
# Enterprise Solution Blueprint - Global Procurement Command Hub

## Solution Summary
Global Procurement Command Hub will be generated as a layered SAP CAP solution with 4 service module(s), 15 UI app(s), strong security defaults, deployment assets, and delivery documentation.

## Service Modules
- **OperationsService** (transactional): Transactional processing, approvals, draft handling, and core business workflows | Entities: Vendor, SupplierContract, PurchaseRequisition, PurchaseOrder, InventoryReservation, WarehouseTask, ServiceWorkOrder, ServiceConfirmation, DispatchAssignment, ApprovalDecision, Invoice, KpiSnapshot
- **AnalyticsService** (analytics): Read-optimized KPIs, dashboards, and operational reporting | Entities: Vendor, SupplierContract, SourcingEvent, PurchaseRequisition, PurchaseOrder, PurchaseOrderItem, InventoryReservation, WarehouseTask, ServiceWorkOrder, ServiceConfirmation, DispatchAssignment, ApprovalDecision, Invoice, KpiSnapshot
- **IntegrationService** (integration): External SAP and non-SAP connectivity through destinations and mashups | Entities: Vendor, SupplierContract, SourcingEvent
- **AdminService** (admin): Configuration, audit, support tooling, and privileged maintenance | Entities: Vendor, SupplierContract, SourcingEvent

## UI Applications
- **VendorApp**: analytical_list_page for `Vendor` via `OperationsService`
- **SupplierContractApp**: analytical_list_page for `SupplierContract` via `OperationsService`
- **SourcingEventApp**: list_report for `SourcingEvent` via `OperationsService`
- **PurchaseRequisitionApp**: analytical_list_page for `PurchaseRequisition` via `OperationsService`
- **PurchaseOrderApp**: analytical_list_page for `PurchaseOrder` via `OperationsService`
- **PurchaseOrderItemApp**: list_report for `PurchaseOrderItem` via `OperationsService`
- **InventoryReservationApp**: analytical_list_page for `InventoryReservation` via `OperationsService`
- **WarehouseTaskApp**: analytical_list_page for `WarehouseTask` via `OperationsService`
- **ServiceWorkOrderApp**: analytical_list_page for `ServiceWorkOrder` via `OperationsService`
- **ServiceConfirmationApp**: analytical_list_page for `ServiceConfirmation` via `OperationsService`
- **DispatchAssignmentApp**: analytical_list_page for `DispatchAssignment` via `OperationsService`
- **ApprovalDecisionApp**: analytical_list_page for `ApprovalDecision` via `OperationsService`
- **InvoiceApp**: analytical_list_page for `Invoice` via `OperationsService`
- **KpiSnapshotApp**: analytical_list_page for `KpiSnapshot` via `OperationsService`
- **ExecutiveOverview**: overview_page for `Vendor` via `AnalyticsService`

## Delivery Scope
- Domain model, services, handlers, UI apps, security, deployment, testing, and documentation
- On-disk generated workspace with manifest and verification report
- Release-readiness checks before download packaging

## Quality Gates
- Schema and service consistency validation
- Security descriptor and role model validation
- Fiori manifest and routing verification
- Workspace materialization and artifact manifest generation
- Deployment descriptor completeness for CAP, approuter, and XSUAA
- Analytics/reporting artifact presence check
- Integration configuration readiness check
- Automated test scaffold presence check
- Release readiness report with build gate summary
- Operational documentation and extension guide verification

## Integrations
- **S/4HANA Business Partner API** (S4HANA): destination-based integration
- **S/4HANA Product Master API** (S4HANA): destination-based integration
- **SuccessFactors Employee Central** (SuccessFactors): destination-based integration

## Architecture Decisions
- Use modular CAP services rather than a single monolithic service definition.
- Generate separate Fiori apps for root business capabilities at enterprise scale.
- Preserve clean-core extensibility through extension artifacts and hook registries.
- Materialize the generated project to disk for downstream build and verification steps.

artifacts_docs.content:
# Enterprise Solution Blueprint - Global Procurement Command Hub

## Solution Summary
Global Procurement Command Hub will be generated as a layered SAP CAP solution with 4 service module(s), 15 UI app(s), strong security defaults, deployment assets, and delivery documentation.

## Service Modules
- **OperationsService** (transactional): Transactional processing, approvals, draft handling, and core business workflows | Entities: Vendor, SupplierContract, PurchaseRequisition, PurchaseOrder, InventoryReservation, WarehouseTask, ServiceWorkOrder, ServiceConfirmation, DispatchAssignment, ApprovalDecision, Invoice, KpiSnapshot
- **AnalyticsService** (analytics): Read-optimized KPIs, dashboards, and operational reporting | Entities: Vendor, SupplierContract, SourcingEvent, PurchaseRequisition, PurchaseOrder, PurchaseOrderItem, InventoryReservation, WarehouseTask, ServiceWorkOrder, ServiceConfirmation, DispatchAssignment, ApprovalDecision, Invoice, KpiSnapshot
- **IntegrationService** (integration): External SAP and non-SAP connectivity through destinations and mashups | Entities: Vendor, SupplierContract, SourcingEvent
- **AdminService** (admin): Configuration, audit, support tooling, and privileged maintenance | Entities: Vendor, SupplierContract, SourcingEvent

## UI Applications
- **VendorApp**: analytical_list_page for `Vendor` via `OperationsService`
- **SupplierContractApp**: analytical_list_page for `SupplierContract` via `OperationsService`
- **SourcingEventApp**: list_report for `SourcingEvent` via `OperationsService`
- **PurchaseRequisitionApp**: analytical_list_page for `PurchaseRequisition` via `OperationsService`
- **PurchaseOrderApp**: analytical_list_page for `PurchaseOrder` via `OperationsService`
- **PurchaseOrderItemApp**: list_report for `PurchaseOrderItem` via `OperationsService`
- **InventoryReservationApp**: analytical_list_page for `InventoryReservation` via `OperationsService`
- **WarehouseTaskApp**: analytical_list_page for `WarehouseTask` via `OperationsService`
- **ServiceWorkOrderApp**: analytical_list_page for `ServiceWorkOrder` via `OperationsService`
- **ServiceConfirmationApp**: analytical_list_page for `ServiceConfirmation` via `OperationsService`
- **DispatchAssignmentApp**: analytical_list_page for `DispatchAssignment` via `OperationsService`
- **ApprovalDecisionApp**: analytical_list_page for `ApprovalDecision` via `OperationsService`
- **InvoiceApp**: analytical_list_page for `Invoice` via `OperationsService`
- **KpiSnapshotApp**: analytical_list_page for `KpiSnapshot` via `OperationsService`
- **ExecutiveOverview**: overview_page for `Vendor` via `AnalyticsService`

## Delivery Scope
- Domain model, services, handlers, UI apps, security, deployment, testing, and documentation
- On-disk generated workspace with manifest and verification report
- Release-readiness checks before download packaging

## Quality Gates
- Schema and service consistency validation
- Security descriptor and role model validation
- Fiori manifest and routing verification
- Workspace materialization and artifact manifest generation
- Deployment descriptor completeness for CAP, approuter, and XSUAA
- Analytics/reporting artifact presence check
- Integration configuration readiness check
- Automated test scaffold presence check
- Release readiness report with build gate summary
- Operational documentation and extension guide verification

## Integrations
- **S/4HANA Business Partner API** (S4HANA): destination-based integration
- **S/4HANA Product Master API** (S4HANA): destination-based integration
- **SuccessFactors Employee Central** (SuccessFactors): destination-based integration

## Architecture Decisions
- Use modular CAP services rather than a single monolithic service definition.
- Generate separate Fiori apps for root business capabilities at enterprise scale.
- Preserve clean-core extensibility through extension artifacts and hook registries.
- Materialize the generated project to disk for downstream build and verification steps.

# Global Procurement Command Hub

Generated enterprise SAP CAP + Fiori project.

## Modules
- Database model under `db/`
- CAP services under `srv/`
- Fiori applications under `app/`
- Security and deployment descriptors at project root

Namespace: `com.enterprise.procurement.command`

# Operations Runbook

## Production Readiness Checklist
- Review destinations and XSUAA bindings
- Validate CAP service build in CI
- Review generated roles and tenant configuration
- Review monitoring, logging, and backup strategy
